parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { topic: $env.NTFY_TOPIC, title: "SMS needs review: " + $json.reasons.join(", "), message: ($json.parsed.merchant || "?") + " — " + $json.parsed.currency + " " + $json.parsed.amount, actions: $json.txn ? [ { action: "http", label: "Approve", url: "http://n8n:5678/webhook/sms-confirm", method: "POST", headers: { "x-confirm-secret": $env.SMS_CONFIRM_SECRET }, body: JSON.stringify({ txn: $json.txn }), clear: true } ] : [] } }}
